notes: Thinking-model ergonomics: startup THINKING MODEL WARNING when loading a <think>-injecting model (GLM-5.1, Nemotron, Qwen3-Thinking, etc.) without a reasoning parser active. --reasoning-parser auto now falls back to deepseek_r1 when the chat template contains <think>. Narrowed detection avoids false-firing on Gemma 4. Swift engine parity. Fixes user report on GLM-5.1-JANG_1L.
